blockingIssues.description: Live verification in the feature handoff reported GET / still returned 404 instead of serving index.html, so the SPA fallback behavior for the backend remains unproven and likely broken.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When implementation handoff verification reports an expected runtime route still returning 404, the feature should not be marked successful; require either a fix or a partial/failure handoff so scrutiny does not inherit unresolved blocking behavior as success.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The backend-static-serving handoff marked success even though its own verification recorded `curl -I http://localhost:3000/` returning 404 instead of the required SPA fallback response.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Provide a fallback review procedure for scrutiny-validator when Task subagents cannot launch because of environment/model misconfiguration, so validators can record that infrastructure issue explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three scrutiny-feature-reviewer Task invocations failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:gpt-5.4-8`, requiring manual synthesis from existing handoffs.
